content: Skaffold replaces docker-build + helm deploy scripts. skaffold.yaml at repo root; 'kind' profile auto-activates on kind-pebblr-local context with lower resource limits. AKS guard in Makefile blocks cluster-up/deploy when aks- nodes detected.

Makefile pins: ESO_VERSION=0.12.1, INGRESS_NGINX_VERSION=4.12.1. cluster-up recreates Kind cluster (delete+create), installs both deps. migrate target inlines 'go run ./cmd/api migrate'. No scripts/ directory — all logic is inlined in Makefile or delegated to skaffold.

TLS local dev setup: deploy/k8s/local-tls/ holds 4 cert-manager manifests (selfsigned-issuer, ca-certificate, ca-issuer, pebblr-cert); deploy/helm/pebblr/values-local.yaml configures nginx ingress with TLS for pebblr.local. cluster-up installs cert-manager v1.17.1 (pinned), dev-certs applies the chain. skaffold kind profile loads values-local.yaml via valuesFiles.
